scripts.dev: npm run watch:css & npm run dev:vite
scripts.build: npm run build:css && vite build && cp -r js dist/ && cp -r css dist/ && cp -r img dist/ && cp script.js dist/ && cp media.js dist/ && cp firebase-messaging-sw.js dist/ && mv dist/leseplan-detaljer.html dist/leseplan-detaljer-template.html && mv dist/en/reading-plan-details.html dist/en/reading-plan-details-template.html && mv dist/es/detalles-plan-lectura.html dist/es/detalles-plan-lectura-template.html && mv dist/blogg-post.html dist/blogg-post-template.html && mv dist/en/blog-post.html dist/en/blog-post-template.html && mv dist/es/blog-post.html dist/es/blog-post-template.html && mv dist/arrangement-detaljer.html dist/arrangement-detaljer-template.html && mv dist/en/event-details.html dist/en/event-details-template.html && mv dist/es/detalles-evento.html dist/es/detalles-evento-template.html && (python3 scripts/optimize_build_assets.py || true)
scripts.dev:local: npm run watch:css & npm run dev:vite & npm run emulators
